; --- globals ---
@.fmt.int_println = private unnamed_addr constant [4 x i8] c"%d\0A\00", align 1

; --- declarations ---
declare i32 @printf(ptr, ...)

; --- definitions ---
; @InputKt_helper
define i32 @InputKt_helper() {
entry:
  %t0 = add i32 0, 42
  ret i32 %t0
}

; @main
define i32 @main() {
entry:
  %t0 = call i32 @InputKt_helper()
  call i32 (ptr, ...) @printf(ptr @.fmt.int_println, i32 %t0)
  ret i32 0
}
